Clawdometer — 300 widget skins · shippable

Every sketch is a candidate skin for the real HUD, drawn at true size on a real wallpaper. Same data as app/ui: 5H 34% · 7D 71% · ↻ resets in 2h 14m.

Constraints: no backdrop-filter (the window is transparent, glass blurs nothing) · motion is transform/opacity only (WebView2 never repaints background on a transparent window) · nothing outside the card bounds (the window is sized to the card, so glows clip).
